allow: Bash(node -e " const fs = require\('fs'\); const input = fs.readFileSync\('/dev/stdin', 'utf8'\); const settings = JSON.parse\(input\); const smartMemoryTools = [ 'mcp__smart-memory__memory_ingest', 'mcp__smart-memory__memory_search', 'mcp__smart-memory__memory_format', 'mcp__smart-memory__memory_kg_add', 'mcp__smart-memory__memory_kg_query', 'mcp__smart-memory__memory_kg_timeline', 'mcp__smart-memory__memory_kg_stats', 'mcp__smart-memory__memory_kg_invalidate', 'mcp__smart-memory__memory_diary_write', 'mcp__smart-memory__memory_diary_read', 'mcp__smart-memory__memory_rules', 'mcp__smart-memory__memory_extract', 'mcp__smart-memory__memory_extract_rules', 'mcp__smart-memory__memory_check_duplicate', 'mcp__smart-memory__memory_maintain', 'mcp__smart-memory__memory_stats', 'mcp__smart-memory__memory_session', 'mcp__smart-memory__memory_outcome', 'mcp__smart-memory__memory_taxonomy', 'mcp__smart-memory__memory_import', 'mcp__smart-memory__memory_mem0_sync' ]; for \(const tool of smartMemoryTools\) { if \(!settings.permissions.allow.includes\(tool\)\) { settings.permissions.allow.push\(tool\); } } console.log\(JSON.stringify\(settings, null, 2\)\); ")
